---
title: "NFL Modeling - G"
output: html_document
date: "2024-11-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(ranger)
library(tidyverse)
```

Data
```{r}
model_data <- read.csv("C:/Users/gabem/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/project-2/data/modeling_data_frame.csv")
```

Get data for each team split into:
full training(1-6), full testing(7-9)
recent training(6-8), recent testing(9)

Mock list structure
```{r}
team_results <- list()

teams <- data %>% select(possession_team) %>% distinct() %>% pull()

for (team in teams){
  
  #Initialize  team 
    team_results[[team]] <- list(
        data = list(),
        models = list(
          full = list(
            model = NA,
            weight = list(
              type = NA,
              value = NA
            ),
            opt = NA,
            confmat = NA,
            confmat_opt = NA
          ),
          rec = list(
            model = NA,
            weight = list(
              type = NA,
              value = NA
            ),
            opt = NA,
            confmat = NA,
            confmat_opt = NA
          )
        )
    )
  
  #Filter team data and weeks played
  team_data <- model_data %>% filter(possession_team == team)
  weeks <- team_data %>% select(week) %>% distinct() %>% pull()
  
  ## Get weeks for both training and testing types
  full_test_weeks <- tail(weeks, 3)
  full_train_weeks <- weeks[1:(length(weeks)-3)]
  
  rec_test_weeks <- tail(weeks, 1)
  rec_train_weeks <- weeks[(length(weeks)-3):(length(weeks)-1)]
  

  
  #Fill data for team
  team_results[[team]]$data$full_train <- team_data %>% filter(week %in% full_train_weeks)
  team_results[[team]]$data$full_test <- team_data %>% filter(week %in% full_test_weeks)
  team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train <- team_data %>% filter(week %in% rec_train_weeks)
  team_results[[team]]$data$rec_test <- test_data %>% filter(week %in% rec_test_weeks)
  
  ##### Modeling #####
  
  # Weights
  
  ## Weights Full
  n_run_full <- sum(team_results[[team]]$data$full_train$run_pass == "run")
  n_pass_full <- sum(team_results[[team]]$data$full_train$run_pass == "pass")
  
  if (n_run_full > n_pass_full) {
    full_weight_ratio = n_run_full/n_pass_full
    
    full_weight_vector <- numeric(nrow(team_results[[team]]$data$full_train))
    full_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$full_train$run_pass == "run"] <- 1
    full_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$full_train$run_pass == "pass"] <- full_weight_ratio
    
    full_weight_class <- "pass"
    
  } else if (n_pass_full > n_run_full){
    
    full_weight_ratio = n_pass_full/n_run_full
    
    full_weight_vector <- numeric(nrow(team_results[[team]]$data$full_train))
    full_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$full_train$run_pass == "pass"] <- 1
    full_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$full_train$run_pass == "run"] <- full_weight_ratio
    
    full_weight_class <- "run"
    
  }
  
  ## Weights Rec
  
  n_run_rec <- sum(team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train$run_pass == "run")
  n_pass_rec <- sum(team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train$run_pass == "pass")
  
  if (n_run_rec > n_pass_rec) {
    rec_weight_ratio = n_run_rec/n_pass_rec
    
    rec_weight_vector <- numeric(nrow(team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train))
    rec_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train$run_pass == "run"] <- 1
    rec_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train$run_pass == "pass"] <- rec_weight_ratio
    
    rec_weight_class <- "pass"
    
    
    
  } else if (n_pass_rec > n_run_rec){
    
    rec_weight_ratio = n_pass_rec/n_run_rec
    
    rec_weight_vector <- numeric(nrow(team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train))
    rec_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train$run_pass == "pass"] <- 1
    rec_weight_vector[team_results[[team]]$data$rec_train$run_pass == "run"] <- rec_weight_ratio
    
    rec_weight_class <- "run"
    
  }
  
  #Store weight class
  team_results[[team]]$models$full$weight$type <- full_weight_class
  team_results[[team]]$models$full$weight$value <- full_weight_ratio
  

  
  # Tune grid

  tuneGrid <- expand.grid(
    mtry = seq(1, 16, 1),
    min.node.size = c(1, 7, 12, 20, 40),
    splitrule = c("gini", "extratrees")
  )
  
    ctrl <- trainControl(
    method = "cv",
    classProbs = TRUE,
    summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
    search = "grid",
    number = 7,
    savePredictions = "final"
  )
    
    
  # Full model
  
  set.seed(120220)
  full_rf <- train(
    run_pass ~ down + yards_to_go + yards_to_endzone + redzone + sec_in_half + offense_formation +
               receiver_alignment + epa_lag + curr_win_percentage + form_change + wr_motion +
               te_motion + rb_motion + wr_atsnap + te_atsnap + rb_atsnap,
    data = team_results[[team]]$data$full_train,
    method = "ranger",
    tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
    trControl = ctrl,
    metric = "ROC",
    importance = 'permutation',
    num.trees = 500,
    weights = full_weight_vector
  )
  
  team_results[[team]]$models$full$model <- full_rf
  
  
  # Prediction Accuracy
  
  #Optimal Treshold
  train_predictions <- predict(full_rf, new_data = team_results[[team]]$data$full_train, type = "prob")
  roc_obj <- roc(team_results[[team]]$data$full_train, train_predictions$run)
  opt <- coords(roc_obj, "best", ret = "threshold", best.method = "youden")[[1]]
  
  team_results[[team]]$models$full$opt <- opt
  
  #Confusion matrix raw
  class_raw <- predict(full_rf, new_data = team_results[[team]]$data$full_test)
  
  full_confmat <- confusionMatrix(class_raw, team_results[[team]]$data$full_test, positive = "run")
  
  team_results[[team]]$models$full$conf_mat <- full_confmat
  
  #Confusion matrix altered
  pred_probs_full <- predict(full_rf, new_data = team_results[[team]]$data$full_test, type = "prob")$run
  class_alt <- as.factor(ifelse(pred_probs_full > opt, "run", "pass"))
  
  
}

# data %>% group_by(possession_team) %>% 
#   summarise(prop_run = sum(run_pass == "run")/n(),
#             prop_pass = sum(run_pass == "pass")/n())
final_df
levels(final_df$run_pass)
```
